question.label: Checking in on blockers
question.name: Are there any blockers or challenges you're currently facing that we should address?
question.description: Standard check-in to ensure Priya is not facing obstacles after the recent refactor.

answer: More clarity on scope would help. And hearing about big projects before they're locked in, not after.

assessment.note: Priya feels a lack of clarity on project scope and expresses frustration about not being engaged or pushed in her growth.

new_queue.label: Exploring project clarity
new_queue.name: What specific information do you think would help clarify your role in upcoming projects?

new_queue.label: Discussing growth opportunities
new_queue.name: How do you envision your growth trajectory changing in the next few months?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week

Payments was real — I owned the migration plan and made the call on the dual-write window. I'm proud of how that went.
Growth-wise I think I'm flat. I'm the most senior IC on the team and there's no one really pushing me.
